---
title: "Projects"
description: "Ongoing and past research projects."
---

Selected research and engineering projects — one page each:

- [MIRA](mira.qmd) — a sovereign AI model factory for multilingual, multimodal Indic AI at IIT Jammu.
- [Sunbird ML Workbench (Daggit)](sunbird-ml-workbench.qmd) — a DAG-based ML pipeline framework built for Project Sunbird.
